text: Live Updates: Iran vows to fight on as Trump says ceasefire is "on life support" - CBS News

text: Democrats ask the Supreme Court to halt a Virginia ruling blocking new congressional districts - AP News
fullText: Democrats have filed an emergency appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court seeking to halt a redistricting rule by Virginia’s top court. The state court had invalidated a ballot measure that would have given Virginia Democrats an additional four winnable U.S. House s…

text: Supreme Court temporarily extends full access to abortion pill while it mulls legal challenge - NBC News
fullText: The justices are still considering what next steps to take in a case that could block availability of the abortion pill mifepristone by mail.

text: Valve Has a Plan to Stop Scalpers From Botting the Steam Machine - Gizmodo

text: Keir Starmer is in crisis mode. Here’s how he can be dislodged. - politico.eu
fullText: From being forced to set out an exit plan to the Cabinet moving against him, brutal elections have put Keir Starmer firmly in the danger zone. POLITICO looks at the options.

text: Physicists Discover Previously Unknown Crystal Forged During Manhattan Project's Trinity Test - Gizmodo
fullText: An unusual crystal created by America’s first nuclear bomb test could help scientists understand a structure needed for quantum computers, solar power, and batteries.

text: The federal gas tax is on Trump’s hit list. Data shows how much would be saved without it. - NBC News
fullText: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

text: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq trade in record territory, Dow up as Trump says Iran cease-fire deal on 'life support' - MarketWatch
fullText: Stocks are higher near record territory Monday with geopolitical and AI developments in the spotlight.

text: Apple brings encrypted RCS chats to iPhone - The Verge
fullText: Apple now lets you have encrypted RCS chats with Android users through the Messages app on iOS, as part of iOS 26.5. The feature is launching in beta.

text: Confident in China’s power, Xi is ready to host an unpredictable Trump - The Washington Post

text: 5 Scenarios for Putin’s Ukraine War - Newsweek

text: BP, Shell, TotalEnergies Pocket Billions in War-Driven Trading Windfall - Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com
fullText: BP, Shell, and TotalEnergies earned up to $4.75 billion more in Q1 trading as the Iran war sent oil prices and market volatility surging.

text: Astronomers Discovered a Brand-New Type of Planet That Reeks of Rotten Eggs and Defies Planetary Science - The Daily Galaxy
fullText: Astronomers have uncovered a new type of exoplanet, L 98-59 d, challenging all known categories of planetary science with its molten surface and sulfur-rich atmosphere.
